relationships.description: Pigeonpea is intercropped with other crops
Maize is used as an intercrop with pigeonpea
Sorghum is used as an intercrop with pigeonpea
Groundnut is used as an intercrop with pigeonpea
Pigeonpea is cultivated in Sri Lanka
Pigeonpea is grown under rainfed conditions
Pigeonpea is introduced in dry and intermediate zones
Short-duration pigeonpea is used for sole cropping
The study assesses the adaptability of short-duration pigeonpea cultivars

relationships.source: FIELD CROPS RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE
relationships.description: The institute is located in Sri Lanka
